expected_artifacts.name: codeclash_logs
expected_artifacts.purpose: Preserve tournament, game, player, and combined logs.

expected_artifacts.name: round_result
expected_artifacts.purpose: Parse the one-simulation BattleSnake result from metadata.

expected_artifacts.name: change_records
expected_artifacts.purpose: Record changed files for the mini and dummy players.

expected_artifacts.name: mini_agent_trajectory
expected_artifacts.purpose: Capture the Mini-SWE-Agent loop and deterministic submit action.

expected_artifacts.name: mini_agent_stats
expected_artifacts.purpose: Verify exit status, cost, and API-call count.

expected_artifacts.name: receipt_review
expected_artifacts.purpose: Check that the result does not overclaim model capability.

first_run_falsifier: The run fails if p1 lacks trajectory or agent_stats evidence, if provider API calls are nonzero, or if diff-scope records are absent.
